name: What if my employer fires me after I file a work injury claim in Boise?
description: Illegal retaliation; file claim anyway, pursue wrongful termination separately.[4]

mainEntity.name: What if my employer fires me after I file a work injury claim in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation; file claim anyway, pursue wrongful termination separately.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp is no-fault and retaliation illegal, but Idaho doesn't require job holding post-injury; sue for wrongful termination separately if proven.[4][5] Report injury within 60 days to preserve rights.[4] Key factors: Timing of firing vs. claim; performance records pre-injury. Key factors: Document communications.[5] Practical guidance: File comp claim first, then consult employment lawyer. Idaho Industrial Commission handles disputes.[4] Protect records to fight retaliation claims.[9]
